findings.title: Branch base one commit behind origin/main
findings.detail: origin/main moved to 2811c7b (PR #376) after the branch was cut from 6b398ff; raw `git diff origin/main` shows ~1481 lines of reverse-noise not part of this phase. No file overlap between the phase diff and PR #376. Rebase before PR.

findings.title: Multi-line docstring annotation vs spec 'single-line comment touch-ups only'
findings.detail: ralph_driver.py restore_local_repo_after_merge docstring edit spans ~5 lines. Proven comment/docstring-only via AST comparison (AST-identical to HEAD with docstrings normalized); no state-machine or gate behavior change.

findings.title: TROUBLESHOOTING removed P234500 worktreeConfig investigation notes
findings.detail: The deleted paragraph carried a standing recommendation about extensions.worktreeConfig removal. Defensible deletion (superseded misdiagnosis log) but the recommendation is now undocumented.

findings.title: pre_push defense layer verified only at plumbing level
findings.detail: Mutation B is caught by a mocked-subprocess test (KeyError 'env'), not an end-to-end leak test. End-to-end guarantee rests on the canary_runner scrub, which is tested unmocked with a real temp-repo flip reproduction.

mutation_tests.name: A: remove env=clean_env from both run_canary subprocess calls
mutation_tests.detail: test_canary_runner_git_init_ignores_leaked_linked_worktree_gitdir FAILED (1 failed, 2 passed in file); direct probe with mutated code reproduced core.bare=true in the temp main repo via git config --get --bool core.bare. Restored; git diff HEAD sha256 byte-identical to baseline faf59fb3b778c879cc6e1bb29751716bc54534d8722e2a034bc05c3cd413e8a0.

mutation_tests.name: B: remove env=clean_env from pre_push.py check-subprocess loop only
mutation_tests.detail: test_pre_push_check_subprocesses_receive_scrubbed_git_env FAILED with KeyError 'env'; exactly 1 failed, 27 passed in tests/unit -k 'hook or canary'. Restored; sha256 byte-identical to baseline.

status_doctor.warn_reason: no live run dir with state.json for DISCOVERY_RIGOR_FLOOR_V1 (expected for WF1 phase)
